params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: F5 step 3-H: synthetic masked WS close frame to UPSTREAM SERVER. #670 verdict (FAIL_close_below_ws) + 47차 5-C sub-agent code review CONFIRMED HP-A root cause: visible_tls_session.cpp:541-668 consumes original client→server WS frame in block_response branch but NEVER forwards to _sproxy. Server sees no client data → times out → sends close back to client → 'Close received after close' on client. Fix: in is_http2==2 + stream_id==0 path (vts.cpp:600-622), send synthesized masked WS close frame (opcode 0x88, code 1000) to server side via write_visible_data(_sproxy). Server cleanly half-closes; client receives our warning text frame + sees clean WS state → onmessage fires → JSON.parse → routing → Korean warning visible. Build run_id=20260430-170615-25859. L1 canary 19/19 PASS regression-free.

devtools_check_instructions: 5. UI: 채팅 영역에 한글 차단 메시지 visible (chat bubble OR error display)
6. Regression: real LLM PII 분석 없어야 함
7. Console: 'Close received after close' 가 사라졌는지 확인. WS Closed code 변화 확인 (1006 → 1000 OR onclose 정상)
8. WS Messages tab: data frame 캡처되었는지 확인 (#669/#670 에서 0 frames)
9. PARTIAL 인 경우: 'Unknown command neo_error' 또는 routing-related console error 보고 → next axis

notes: F5 step 3-H: synthetic upstream WS close — solves server-timeout-close cycle per #670 sub-agent diagnosis
